description: CompositionBlack sleeveless tshirt made of 100% polyester, has a round neckline, iconic three stripes on the sides in white fabric strips, mesh panels on the sides and back, and embroidered brand name on the upper left chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water below 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsLook cool while working out in this black sleeveless vest from adidas. The iconic three stripes on the sides and the embroidered logo on the upper left chest increases the brand appeal, while the fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team it with tracks and performance shoes for sporting activities.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulder 18& rdquo
